content: For curator email pre-send validation: use the 'validator' npm package (v13.15.35, actively maintained, has @types/validator v13.15.10 for TypeScript). Call validator.isEmail(email) before sending via Resend. The 'email-validator' package (v2.0.4) was last published 8 years ago — do not use. validator.js is already commonly used in Next.js + TypeScript stacks, has zero dependencies, and covers RFC 5322 syntax. This is format-only validation; bounce detection via Resend webhooks handles deliverability.
